description: Create a batch of Messages API requests to the Anthropic API.

evaluation.validation_summary: Ctx2Skill-lite preview verifier contract. External corpus parse/audit keeps this ephemeral until a human approves import.

implementation.prompt_template: To create a batch of Messages API requests, send a POST request to the endpoint /v1/messages/batches with a JSON body containing the batch details. Optionally, include a request_id header to identify the batch. The response will contain the batch object with its ID and status.

messages.description: List of messages to include in the batch.

request_id.description: Optional custom identifier for the batch.

postconditions: Batch is created and pending processing.
preconditions: User has valid API credentials for Anthropic API.

name: create_message_batch_api_doc_anthropic_create_message_batch

challenges.expected_evidence: API call is made with proper structure to create the batch.
challenges.failure_signal: Missing endpoint or incorrect HTTP method; no batch content provided.
rubric: Specifies the batch content (list of messages).
challenges.task: Create a batch of messages to ask Claude to summarize three documents.

challenges.expected_evidence: Clear explanation of using request_id header.
challenges.failure_signal: Omits the header parameter or misstates its role.
rubric: Describes the benefit of custom identifier for tracking or idempotency.
challenges.task: Explain how to include a custom identifier for the batch and why it might be useful.

examples: Example request: POST /v1/messages/batches with header request_id: my-batch-123 and body containing list of messages.
facts: It has an optional request_id header parameter.
The summary describes creating a batch of Messages API requests.
procedures: To create a batch, send a POST request to /v1/messages/batches with the required request body (not fully specified here) and optionally include a request_id header.
